name: Girlfriend [v2]
description:
An overhauled version of my other Girlfriend bot, this time with a more in-depth personality and intro!
Based off of her canon personality with a few changes and head cannons.


[Boyfriend sold separately.]

Profile image is an edited version of a wonderful illustration made by @RealDazzen.

Made this remake mainly to give her more depth, and to account that Boyfriend has been taken out of the picture.

I've been meaning to finish this bot for a while so I can work on requests, but it's practically finished.

If you have any issues with the bot, or want to make suggestions to make this bot better, please leave a commet!
